concerns.text: FR-001 and US-1 require outlier exclusion and reporting of excluded points. Task T014b is marked incomplete ([ ]) and lacks the implementation to filter flagged outliers, output the filtered dataset, and register the checksum. Without this, the pipeline cannot proceed to US2, and SC-001/SC-003 cannot be verified.

FR-007 and SC-004 require the pipeline to execute within 6 hours and generate timing evidence. Task T016 is marked incomplete ([ ]) and lacks the implementation to log start/end times, assert the limit, and generate `data/results/timing_evidence.json`. This prevents verification of the success criterion.

FR-002, FR-003, FR-004 and US-2 require robust associational correlation analysis (method selection, FDR, framing). Tasks T020 through T027 are all marked incomplete ([ ]). No tasks exist to implement the core statistical logic, method selection, or report generation for US-2.

FR-005, FR-006 and US-3 require sensitivity analysis, collinearity diagnostics (VIF), and power analysis. Tasks T028 through T035 are all marked incomplete ([ ]). No tasks exist to implement these diagnostics or integrate them into the final report.
FR-007 and Plan.md require a CI workflow to run on `ubuntu-latest` with resource limits. Task T008 is marked incomplete ([ ]) and lacks the implementation of the GitHub Actions workflow file.

Plan.md and Spec.md require defined schemas for predictors, outcomes, and output. Tasks T004a, T004b, and T005a are marked incomplete ([ ]) and lack the implementation of the YAML schema files in `contracts/`.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) and Plan.md require a Reference-Validator Agent gate. Task T009b is marked incomplete ([ ]) and lacks the implementation of the agent logic and CI integration.
Plan.md and general project hygiene require documentation, code cleanup, and quickstart validation. Tasks T036 through T040 are marked incomplete ([ ]) and lack implementation.

Task T010 is marked complete ([X]) but describes a 'Contract test for dataset schema validation'. Since the schema files (T004a/b) are marked incomplete, this test cannot currently run or validate existence. The task status should be [ ] until the schemas are defined, or the description should clarify it is a placeholder for future implementation.

Task T013 is marked complete ([X]) but depends on consuming the output of T012 (variable_load_metrics.json), which is marked incomplete. The task cannot be functionally complete if its prerequisite artifact generation is missing.
